title: A Strange Kingdom in Elbaf
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Zoro, Usopp as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get some spring water and put it out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, do you smell that aroma?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is it coming from the forest?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the flames spread to Yggdrasil, then the country's done for!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to report this to the great sun God...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What could've happened to these stingermol???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They don't just fall outta the sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: People in the forest reported that the tremors we felt earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: were caused when the mighty ear god collapsed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid!! What could hurt that enormous rabbit?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What is with this huge bee thing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: morning, NAM!! Say, where are we?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No idea!! Last thing I knew we were still on the Giants' ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Am I Dreaming?! Where is this place?!

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
